productDisplayName: Highlander Men White Purple Black Grey Checked Shirt
description: Composition100% cotton shirt with long sleeves, elbow button, small checks in purple, black and grey, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, pocket on left chest and full length buttoned placket with white stitch detailingFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this bold checked shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day, while you can change your look to a more casual one by rolling up the sleeves to your elbow and securing them with the buttoned flap. This shirt can be teamed with jeans or chinos and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
